utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan for presence and full specification with costs. 1) health_coverage: It includes physical and mental entries and shows monthly and annual costs, but the physical line is contradictory: '€1,080/year (pre-discount) / €1,782 annually after discount' which is inconsistent and unclear; mental is 'incorporated' without a clear annual cost—partially specified but not fully clear. 2) property_coverage: Present with description and cost €60/month and ~€648 annually—fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Present with description and costs (€110/month base, ~€99/month after 10% discount; ~€1,188 annually) and timing start Feb 20—appears fully specified. 4) additional_services: Provides an action (cancellation) and notes cost of current policy (~€15/month), which counts as a cost-related service—arguably specified. 5) total_budget: Provides monthly and annual totals—specified. Considering 'fully specified with all details,' health_coverage has inconsistencies and unclear aggregation; thus it should not count as fully specified. The other four are adequately specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) LifeFirst Standard Plan for health (physical and mental). From ground truth: Primary health physical -> LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 9; Mental health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 4. (2) Property coverage described as LifeFirst Standard property extension; in ground truth property_protection home_content -> LifeFirst Standard Coverage rating 9. (3) Travel coverage uses EliteTravel Premium Plan; in ground truth mobility_coverage travel_insurance -> EliteTravel Premium Plan rating 2. (4) Additional service is cancellation of BackpackerSafe Basic policy, which has no corresponding item in ratings; ignore. (5) Total budget is not an item. Therefore, map those four items to their ratings.
